user.title: Configure Window
user.description: Define the geometry and properties of the window.

geometry.name: Geometry
geometry.description: Physical dimensions and orientation of the window

data_description.width: Width of the window in cm
data_description.height: Height of the window in cm
data_description.visible_azimuth_start: Start angle of visible sky section
data_description.visible_azimuth_end: End angle of visible sky section

properties.name: Properties (optional)
properties.description: Optional: Override global properties for this window

data_description.frame_width: Window frame width in cm (per side)
data_description.window_recess: Recess of window opening in wall

data_description.name: Unique name for the window
data_description.group_id: Optional: Assign window to a group
data_description.geometry: Physical dimensions and orientation of the window
data_description.geometry/width: Width of the window in cm
data_description.geometry/height: Height of the window in cm
data_description.geometry/visible_azimuth_start: Start angle of visible sky section
data_description.geometry/visible_azimuth_end: End angle of visible sky section
data_description.properties: Optional: Override global properties for this window
data_description.properties/frame_width: Window frame width in cm (per side)
data_description.properties/window_recess: Recess of window opening in wall

user.title: Configure Group
user.description: Define the group and its properties.

properties.name: Properties (optional)
properties.description: Optional: Override global properties for this group

data_description.frame_width: Window frame width in cm (per side)
data_description.window_recess: Recess of window opening in wall

data_description.name: Unique name for the group
data_description.group_type: Room (with temperature sensor) or Orientation (e.g. South)
data_description.temp_indoor: Indoor temperature sensor for this group (room type only)
data_description.properties: Optional: Override global properties for this group
data_description.properties/frame_width: Window frame width in cm (per side)
data_description.properties/window_recess: Recess of window opening in wall

user.title: Set up Solar Window System
user.description: Configure global sensor selection and default properties for all windows.

properties.name: Window properties
properties.description: These values can be overridden per window/group later

data_description.frame_width: Window frame width in cm (per side)
data_description.window_recess: Recess of window opening in wall

data_description.irradiance_sensor: Sensor for current solar irradiance in W/m²
data_description.properties: These values can be overridden per window/group later
data_description.properties/frame_width: Window frame width in cm (per side)
data_description.properties/window_recess: Recess of window opening in wall

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Solar Window System
reconfigure.description: Change global configuration and default properties.

properties.name: Window properties
properties.description: These values can be overridden per window/group later

data_description.frame_width: Window frame width in cm (per side)
data_description.window_recess: Recess of window opening in wall

data_description.irradiance_sensor: Sensor for current solar irradiance in W/m²

abort.reconfigure_successful: Reconfiguration successful. The settings have been updated and the integration has been reloaded.
